name: Cassie and May
description:
[8 INTROS][1 futa/1 female] Your friend May from college invited you back to her place to study. Cassie, her step-sister, crashed your study session and is bullying her relentlessly, as is usual. How will you react?

NSFW Cassie 1 (Pictured Left)

NSFW Cassie 2

NSFW May 1 (Pictured Right)

NSFW May 2

If catbox is down the pictures are all in my Discord server.

⚠️ The ntr tag is for intro 4 and 5 and is not hardcoded to happen anywhere else. It is entirely avoidable unless you choose the previously mentioned intros.

Synopsis

In this chat you'll meet May and Cassie, whom are step-sisters. Both of which are attending college full time and live together. The innocent and shy (futa) May, who has a crush on you, is your newfound friend that invites you back to her place for a study session.. but this is quickly crashed by her step-sister and bully, Cassie (female) who is harboring not only a crush on May, but an attraction to you as well. What happens next is strictly decided by not only your actions but by which introduction you pick. There is a mix of complex emotions going on and mutual attraction between all three of you. The most prominent of these being Cassie's hidden crush on May.

The premise of this bot is to explore complex feelings between three people, with a wide variety of routes possible. I'd advise you all to voice what you want in your replies in the chat. Anything is possible, whether it's becoming a throuple or claiming one of the ladies for yourself.

Introduction Guide

  1. Neutral - The standard start to the story. Your new futa friend May has invited you to her place to study. Her bully step-sister crashes the party. You can fight to defend May or dig a little deeper.

  2. Too Far - An intro for the angst lovers. During the previously mentioned study session, Cassie's bullying was taken too far and May is quite upset, storming out of the room. You're now left alone with the shocked and regretful Cassie, who genuinely didn't mean to take things that far. You can tear into Cassie or get to know why she does these things.

  3. Fighting Back - The final more angsty introduction. May is sick of Cassie's bullshit and stands up for herself. Cassie is flabbergasted. Will you cool the normally passive May down or urge her to continue?

  4. ⚠️ May Dom - One of the two introductions that would be considered ntr. After the tense study session where May got angry and finally stood up for herself, she politely asked you to reschedule for another day so things could cool off. Well for one reason or another you stuck around and through the crack in the door you see May snapped and is revenge fucking Cassie. (This only happens in this specific intro and isn't hardcoded to happen anywhere else.)

  5. ⚠️ Cassie Dom - Similar to the previous intro but the roles are reversed. Cassie is overwhelmed and tired of hiding her lust for May. She pounces once you leave.

  6. Trio Romance - Cassie is subjected to some very pointed questions during the study session by none other than YOU. You poke and prod her on why she bullies May until she finally confesses her feelings. While May is flattered and does think Cassie is gorgeous, she then admits that she actually had feelings for you, the user, first. She just hasn't tol
creator: NobodyAB
